hero.name: Daiki Wada
hero.title: Frontend Engineer / M2 Researcher
hero.bio: I build websites and web applications.

about.heading: // about
about.p1: I'm a frontend engineer and Master's student based in Tokyo. I build websites that faithfully reproduce designs and develop web applications with fast implementation.
about.p2: I'm currently in my second year of a Master's program at Chiba Institute of Technology, where my research focuses on distributed systems.
about.p3: When I'm not coding, you can find me reading technical papers or experimenting with new frameworks.

items.description: Built an in-house AI ad-tag classification app at Generative AI Lab, handling everything from tech selection to deployment solo
Implemented batch processing and wrote integration design docs in English, working in an international team
Independently developed a new feature using the Document Picture-in-Picture API
Proposed and prototyped a new feature for Yahoo News, adding functionality to an existing large-scale codebase with another student
Experienced full-cycle development from requirements to testing, handling upstream processes in a team setting

projects.title: Security Guard Shift Management System
